debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : Category α
c Y : α
⊢ (fun g => comp g (Category.id Y)) = Category.id (Hom c Y)

failed_attempts:
have h_main : (fun g => comp g (Category.id Y)) = Category.id (Hom c Y) := by
      funext g
      rw [Category.id_apply]
      <;> simp [Category.comp_id]
      <;>
      aesop
    exact h_main

have h1 : (fun g : Hom c Y => g ≫ (id Y : Hom Y Y)) = id (Hom c Y) := by
      funext g
      simp [id_comp]
    exact h1

funext g
    simp [id_comp]
  <;> rfl
  map_comp {X Y Z : α} (f : Hom Y Z) (g : Hom X Y) := by
    funext h
    simp [comp_assoc]
    <;>
    clear f g h
    <;>
    simp_all [comp_assoc]
    <;>
    try simp_all [comp_assoc]
    <;>
    try simp_all [comp_assoc]

funext g
    simp [Category.id_right]
    <;>
    simp_all [Function.comp, Hom]
    <;>
    aesop

funext g
    simp [id_comp]
  <;> aesop
  <;> simp_all [comp_assoc]
  <;> aesop
  <;> simp_all [comp_assoc]
  <;> aesop

ext ⟨g, hg⟩
    simp [hg]
    <;> simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
    <;> rfl
  map_comp {Y Z W : α} (f : Hom Y Z) (g : Hom Z W) := by
    ext ⟨h, hh⟩
    simp [hh]
    <;> simp_all [Hom.ext_iff]
    <;> rfl

ext g
    simp [id_comp]
  map_comp _ _ := by sorry

have h_main : (fun (g : Hom c Y) => g ≫ (id Y : Hom Y Y)) = (id : Hom c Y → Hom c Y) := by
      funext g
      rw [eq_comm]
      -- Simplify the expression g ≫ id Y to g
      rw [← comp_id g]
      <;> simp [comp_id]
    -- Use the fact that g ≫ id Y = g to conclude that the function is the identity
    funext g
    simp_all [comp_id]
    <;> aesop
  map_comp {Y Z W : α} (f : Hom Y Z) (g : Hom Z W) := by
    intro h
    -- Use the associativity of composition to simplify the expression
    simp [Hom.ext_iff, Function.comp_apply, category_theory.comp_apply]
    <;> simp_all [trans_assoc]
    <;> try aesop
